name: insurance claims supervisors managing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims supervisors processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient tracking causes delays in claim resolutions. We automate status updates instead of manual tracking and email updates.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking and updating of claim statuses
